title: Landscapes

video.note: Covers creating a new map for landscapes, entering Landscape mode, creating a landscape, sculpting terrain, raising and lowering with mouse/Shift, brush size, falloff, smooth brush, and flatten brush for terraces or playable areas.

learningTarget: I can create, sculpt, and shape a basic Unreal landscape with intentional terrain forms.

bellRinger.prompt: What makes outdoor terrain look natural instead of flat or artificial?

vocabulary.definition: A terrain surface used to build outdoor ground in Unreal.
The shape and surface of outdoor ground such as hills, valleys, and cliffs.
A landscape tool action that raises or lowers terrain.
A tool that softens sharp or bumpy terrain changes.
A tool that creates a more level area from a chosen height.
A natural wearing-down effect or terrain idea used to make landforms feel less artificial.
The height of terrain compared with nearby areas.
How wide the landscape tool affects the terrain.
How strongly the tool changes terrain.
How large the terrain feels compared with the player or objects.

assignment.title: Sculpted Terrain Study
evidenceRequired: Google Drive link to a screenshot of Landscape mode or landscape setup.
Google Drive link to a wide shot of sculpted terrain.
Google Drive link to a close-up showing terrain shaping or refinement.
Short reflection naming the landscape tools used.

exitTicket: Which landscape tool changed your terrain most clearly, and how?
